metadata.copyright: Music and Setting: 'Far, Far Away On Judea`s Plains' John M. MacFarlane, 1869. public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2010 Revision.
c_lines: Music and Setting: 'Far, Far Away On Judea`s Plains' John M. MacFarlane, 1869.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2010 Revision.

1.raw_text: Far, far away on Judea's plains, Shepherds of old heard the joyous strains: Glory to God, glory to God, Glory to God in the highest; Peace on earth, good will to men; Peace on earth, good will to men.

2.raw_text: Sweet are these strains of redeeming love, Message of mercy from heaven above: highest; Peace on earth, good will to men; Peace on earth, good will to men.

3.raw_text: Lord, with the angels we too would rejoice; Help us to sing with the heart and voice: highest; Peace on earth, good will to men; Peace on earth, good will to men.

4.raw_text: Hasten the time when, from every clime, Men shall unite in the strains sublime: highest; Peace on earth, good will to men; Peace on earth, good will to men.
